top_signals.title: Philippine Court Drops Remaining Marcos Ill-Gotten Wealth Case
top_signals.summary: The Philippine anti-graft court dismissed the remaining claims in a civil case seeking to recover assets allegedly acquired by the late former President Ferdinand Marcos and his family.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
top_signals.summary: The Instagram accounts for the Obama White House and the Chief Master Sergeant of the U.S. Space Force were briefly defaced with pro-Iranian images and messages over the weekend, after instructions began circulating on Telegram showing how to trick Meta's "AI support assistant" bot into resetting account passwords.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Meta weighs big equity raising after blockbuster Google deal
top_signals.summary: Facebook parent could sell tens of billions of dollars in new stock as it seeks to finance AI infrastructure
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Russia seeks to label two anti-Kremlin hacker groups as ‘extremist’
top_signals.summary: The groups have previously claimed responsibility for cyberattacks targeting critical infrastructure and government institutions in Russia and Belarus.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
